approved_subtitle: Two precise opening lines — validated against Stockfish 18 on a published fixed suite
approved_promises: Learn two concrete opening lines — one for White, one for Black — with every move explained
Study annotated model games from real engine-vs-engine matches against Stockfish 18
Understand the strategic plans and patterns that make each line work
Drill the common deviations opponents actually play
Carry the complete system offline in book + app form
Verify every claim yourself with the published PGN files and reproduction commands
Stop forgetting key move orders with the built-in drill system
Know exactly where the repertoire's tested boundaries end

proof_status.assessment: Real, reproducible positive trend. Not yet statistically proven at 95% confidence.

scope_statement: All results apply only to the published CounterLine fixed opening suite (Vienna Gambit Accepted as White, Caro-Kann Classical 4...Bf5 as Black) at the tested time control (1+0.1), thread count (1), and hash size (64 MB). No claims are made about general engine strength, other openings, other time controls, multi-threaded configurations, or human play.
narrow_claim_if_proof_exists: Validated on the published CounterLine fixed suite against Stockfish 18 at TC 1+0.1, 1 thread, 64 MB hash
allowed_performance_statements: CounterLine Combined scored 52.50% against Stockfish 18 on the published fixed suite (LOS ~93%)
The Black specialist scored 53.75% on the Caro-Kann Classical exit, with 3 wins and 0 losses as Black in 20 games
The Vienna Gambit exit position is nearly 100% winning for White regardless of engine
Results are from 40-game matches with ±23 Elo error bars
The null-wrapper control scored exactly 50%, confirming gains come from the specialist
LOS values of 92-93% indicate a positive trend, not yet proven at the conventional 95% threshold
required_disclaimers: CounterLine is derived from Stockfish and distributed under GPL-3.0
Results are specific to the published fixed suite and tested conditions
Engine-vs-engine results do not automatically transfer to human play
40-game matches have statistical error bars of approximately ±23 Elo
